rules: Online axes may not consume stale certificates.
Pending and virtual-loss counts shape selection but never count as completed evidence.
A negative result is scoped to module x role x game x budget x evaluator x hardware.
Representation changes and controller changes are evaluated in separate campaigns first.
Synthetic mechanism success does not establish neural-MCTS efficacy.
Every axis needs a baseline, artifact contract, failure behavior, and revival condition before promotion.
